title: (PSGO) Patrix Style Grass Overlay 16x
description: this is an inspired overlay that patrix uses on their grass, i thought it looked cool so i made this, this pack is 16x
body:
This Resource pack uses the code from Patrix resource pack to add a bit of depth to the grass! (you know that cool stuff that pokes out of the grass to add depth to it? yeah that) this pack is somewhat vanilla friendly

THIS PACK IS MADE TO BE USED WITH SHADERS! you can **not** use a shader but they look like fallen leaves which isnt the intention but looks cool either way!
